_description: Residual cascade (symmetric, detach) — Stage 0 U-Net [32,64,128,256] + Stage 1 ResUNet [32,64,128,256], stages trained independently. Both stages now use 4-level features (previously Stage 1 used 5-level [16,32,64,128,256] which confounded depth with the residual connection). Against the naive cascade this isolates the effect of the residual connection; against the dual-domain variant it isolates the effect of adding sinogram-domain priors.
